text.title: Testing in JavaScript / TypeScript Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying testing-javascript must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

required.field: Test environment per file or globally.
MSW version if API mocking used.

forbidden.pattern: No `screen.getByTestId` when an ARIA role would resolve the same element.
No `jest.mock('axios')` style module stubs for HTTP — use MSW.
No `enzyme` in new code — Testing Library only.
No `console.log` in test files — fails lint.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key (slug, id, name) before serialising.
Round numeric values to 2 decimal places when serialising.

example.note: Missing the first required field and `forbidden_seen` is non-empty — schema rejects both.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
